segments.note: pack 1 rip: hands grab dark foil pack and tear it open (rip moment)
cards pulled out of pack 1, pack-art card + first cards fanned in hand (flowing)
red/orange parallel card slides up into hand, held high and readable (flows into fan)
continuous in-hand fan/swap of pack-1 cards: red card re-gripped, red-top B card brought up (flowing)
yellow/gold-bottom card held high, readable (continuation of fan)
silver big-B logo Bowman base card slides up, held centered
purple/holo parallel player card shown then silver B re-shown, continuous in-hand swap (flowing)
pack 2 rip: new foil pack opened, pack-art card emerges (rip moment)
cards pulled from pack 2 and fanned/separated in hand (flowing)
sepia/cream player base card slides up, held high and readable
light cream player card re-gripped, then dark premium/insert card revealed and held (flowing; likely a hit)
silver/holo refractor player card (red corner accents) slides up, held high
sepia/cream player card with red accents held high, readable
